title: Boykisser Skybox
description: adds a skybox to the game that is boykisser
body:
- # This is a texturepack that adds boykisser as a skybox
- thats all it does
- Example

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Picture of the skybox whilst someone is on a house](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/acfde721d7c5cc909f0c7a197b9668812c0e833a_0.webp)

</details>

# - U will need [skyboxify](https://modrinth.com/mod/skyboxify) or [optifine](https://optifine.net/home) for it to work 
- i think it should work on all versions of minecraft that you have skyboxify installed on
- (i did not check all optifine vers but it should work)
